what_it_does: This file is a YAML-frontmatter attachment record that links an attachment identifier to a channel board item and records when it was added.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter with no body content
It belongs to the dragnet-development channel
The target is a board:// URI pointing to item-94f645b6
standouts: The target uses a board://item-94f645b6 URI scheme
It records provenance via an ISO 8601 added timestamp
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata
Attachment id uses the att- prefix
Channel-memory attachments are stored under channel_attachments/
concerns: The file carries no human-readable title or description of what is attached
The board item target is opaque without additional context
No author or reason for addition is recorded
notes: A minimal provenance stub that ties attachment att-70cfacb1 to board item item-94f645b6 in the dragnet-development channel.
questions: What content or artifact does attachment att-70cfacb1 represent?
What is the subject of board item item-94f645b6?
Who added this attachment and why?
apparent_themes: Traceability between artifacts and channel board items
intention_signals: It appears intended to register an attachment as belonging to a specific board item in a development channel, creating a persistent cross-reference with a timestamp.
novelty: The use of a board:// URI scheme to target a board item is a distinctive linking convention.
contribution: It contributes a durable cross-reference between an attachment identifier and a board item, plus a creation timestamp, which a fused system could use to reconstruct attachment lineage.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML attachment metadata record named att-70cfacb1 in the dragnet-development channel that targets board item item-94f645b6 and records an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: This file was created to log that an attachment is associated with a specific channel board item at a known point in time.
